heroHeadline: Day 44: Israeli Military on Heightened Alert for Renewed Iran War; Tehran Hardliners Defy Ceasefire Talks
heroSubtitle: Israeli army chief Eyal Zamir placed the IDF on heightened readiness for possible renewed war against Iran, underscoring fragility in the ceasefire framework. Simultaneously, Iranian authorities urged supporters to maintain street presence — signaling hardline factions are constraining Tehran's diplomatic flexibility as US-Iran talks continue in Islamabad.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-12. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal, The Independent, Jerusalem Post.
